title: Criminal Litigation
description: Expert defense and legal representation in criminal proceedings within the District and High Courts of Nepal.
detail: Specializing in bail applications, white-collar crime defense, and appellate practice.

title: Property & Land Law
description: Comprehensive assistance with land disputes, registration, and Lalpurja-related matters in the Kaski region.
detail: Handling Guthi land issues, Mohi rights, and border wall disputes with local authorities.

title: Family & Divorce
description: Sensitive legal handling of Ansa-Banda (inheritance), divorce, and domestic relations cases.
detail: Child custody, alimony settlements, and marital property division according to the 2074 Code.

title: Corporate Law
description: Helping local businesses with registration, compliance, and contract management in Pokhara.
detail: Company formation, foreign investment regulation, and intellectual property protection.

title: Banking and Finance
description: Representing major financial institutions in Pokhara for loan recovery, mortgage vetting, and compliance with Nepal Rastra Bank directives.

title: Cyber Law and IT
description: Providing guidance on the Electronic Transactions Act, ensuring your business is protected against digital fraud and defamation.
